meta.notes: All URLs target the 'latest' channel on grafana.com/docs which currently resolves to the Grafana 12.4.x stable line. Prefer 'latest' over pinned versions so the skill tracks Grafana releases without per-version edits. AWS Managed Grafana mirrors of these pages were intentionally excluded — content lags upstream and rebrands UI terminology.

skill_scope.summary: Authoring and maintaining Grafana dashboards as JSON and via the UI: dashboard structure, panel selection and configuration, variables, transformations, links/annotations, library panels, version history, and provisioning-ready JSON. Excludes alerting, data source configuration, and PromQL/LogsQL/MetricsQL syntax — those are sibling skills.
in_scope: Dashboard JSON model (v1 legacy schema and v2 Observability-as-Code schema)
Panel types selection guidance (timeseries, stat, gauge, bar gauge, table, logs, heatmap, histogram, geomap, canvas, node graph, traces, flame graph, text, news, etc.)
Panel editor: queries, transformations, standard options, thresholds, value mappings, field overrides, data links
Variables: query, custom, constant, datasource, interval, ad-hoc filters, text box, chained variables, repeat panels/rows
Dashboard settings: general, time options, variables, annotations, links, permissions
Library panels: create, link, unlink, propagation semantics
Annotations: built-in, query-based, alert state changes
out_of_scope: Alert rule authoring and notification routing (separate skill)

key_topics: Dashboard JSON schema (v1 vs v2 — v2 is the Observability-as-Code schema introduced for Grafana 12)
Panel editor structure: Query / Transform / Visualization tabs and the field-config + override system
Variable types and chained variables (dependencies between variables)
Repeat panels and rows driven by multi-value/Include-all variables
Library panels as the canonical reuse mechanism (changes propagate to all instances)
Annotation sources: native (manual), query-based, and alert state changes
Dashboard links vs panel links vs data links — three distinct mechanisms
Version history saved on every Save; diff and restore in Settings > Versions
Time controls: dashboard-level time picker, panel relative-time overrides, refresh intervals
gaps_and_concerns: The 'Repeat rows/panels' page in latest is now consolidated under 'Configure panel options' and 'Create dashboard'; older standalone /add-panels-dynamically/ URLs no longer exist in latest. The inventory uses the anchor on the create-dashboard page.
Grafana introduced JSON schema v2 for Observability-as-Code in Grafana 12; v1 JSON model still works but the skill should clearly mark which schema a snippet targets.
Variables page URL paths shifted between 11.x and 12.x; current canonical path is /dashboards/variables/ (not /visualizations/dashboards/variables/ which is the Grafana Cloud mirror).

Several panel-type pages live under /panels-visualizations/visualizations/<type>/ — when the skill enumerates panel types it should link to the catalog index page and let users drill in, rather than listing 25+ URLs.
